title: Goldman Sachs warns UK T-bills are no 'magic bullet' for UK fiscal woes as borrowing costs surge
summary_full: The U.K. government could look to issue more shorter-dated debt in a bid to ease its overall funding costs.
summary_public: The U.K. government could look to issue more shorter-dated debt in a bid to ease its overall funding costs.
